Manatee County FHA Loans

FHA loans across Manatee County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why Manatee offers Gulf Coast value, and how to get pre-approved.

Manatee County Home Loans

FHA loans in Manatee County, Florida

Manatee County offers some of the best value on the Gulf Coast, anchored by Bradenton and the booming, master-planned Lakewood Ranch area. With abundant new construction and prices more attainable than neighboring Sarasota, it's a strong FHA market — the loan limit comfortably covers most homes, and new communities pass the FHA appraisal with ease.

Manatee County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Manatee County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Manatee County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Manatee's relatively affordable market, that covers most homes, including the new construction around Lakewood Ranch and Parrish. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Manatee County's exact figure with HUD.

Lakewood Ranch growth and Gulf Coast value

Manatee's new-construction communities — especially in the Lakewood Ranch area and fast-growing Parrish — are tailor-made for FHA, with modern homes within the loan limit, ideal for first-time buyers. The county generally offers better value than Sarasota next door. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds, and we'll get you pre-approved before you shop.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Manatee County

We help FHA buyers throughout Manatee County, including Bradenton, the Lakewood Ranch area, Palmetto, and Parrish. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Bradenton

Down payment help in Manatee County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Manatee County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Manatee County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Manatee County for 2026?+
Manatee County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Manatee County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it offers strong Gulf Coast value plus abundant new construction within the FHA limit, especially around Lakewood Ranch and Parrish.
Does FHA work for Lakewood Ranch-area new construction?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Manatee County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Manatee County?+
Yes — Bradenton, the Lakewood Ranch area, Palmetto, Parrish, and every community in the county.
